title: Most organizations think they are ready for AI because they bought a tool. But buying a tool does not make you ready. If you cannot govern information, you cannot govern AI. Here is the diagnostic every organization should use. If you cannot answer yes to all - LinkedIn

**Source:** LinkedIn Cybersecurity
**Link:** https://news.google.?oc=5

Most organizations think they are ready for AI because they bought a tool. But buying a tool does not make you ready. If you cannot govern information, you cannot govern AI. Here is the diagnostic every organization should use. If you cannot answer yes to all &nbsp;&nbsp; LinkedIn
